description: The user hovers the cursor over the 'AI Interview' task card on the Explore page.
frame_description: The Explore page is visible, showing various task cards under 'Short tasks & surveys' and 'Sessions to schedule'.

description: The user clicks on the filter icon in the top right corner of the Explore page.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the filter icon at the top right of the screen.

description: A brief pause occurs after clicking the filter icon before the filter modal begins to appear.
frame_description: The Explore page remains visible while the application processes the filter request.

description: The 'Filter Opportunities' modal slides up from the bottom of the screen.
frame_description: The filter modal is now fully visible, overlaying the Explore page.

description: The user hovers the cursor over the 'Under 10 min' duration filter option.
frame_description: The filter modal is open, and the cursor is over the 'Under 10 min' button in the Duration section.

description: The user selects the 'Under 10 min' duration filter.
frame_description: The user clicks the 'Under 10 min' button.

description: The 'Under 10 min' button changes its visual state to selected (blue background).
frame_description: The 'Under 10 min' button is now highlighted in blue.

description: The user selects the '10-30 min' duration filter.
frame_description: The user clicks the '10-30 min' button.

description: The '10-30 min' button becomes selected, and the 'Under 10 min' button is automatically deselected.
frame_description: The '10-30 min' button is now highlighted, while 'Under 10 min' returns to its default state.

description: The user selects the 'Under 10 min' duration filter again.
frame_description: The user clicks the 'Under 10 min' button.

description: The 'Under 10 min' button becomes selected, and the '10-30 min' button is deselected.
frame_description: The selection has toggled back to 'Under 10 min'.

description: The user clicks the 'Under 10 min' button to deselect it.
frame_description: The user clicks the already selected 'Under 10 min' button.

description: The 'Under 10 min' button returns to its unselected state.
frame_description: No duration filters are currently selected.

description: The user selects the '10-30 min' duration filter.
frame_description: The user clicks the '10-30 min' button.

description: The '10-30 min' button changes to its selected state.
frame_description: The '10-30 min' button is highlighted.

description: The user clicks the '10-30 min' button to deselect it.
frame_description: The user clicks the already selected '10-30 min' button.

description: The '10-30 min' button returns to its unselected state.
frame_description: No duration filters are currently selected.

description: The user selects the 'Under 10 min' duration filter.
frame_description: The user clicks the 'Under 10 min' button.

description: The 'Under 10 min' button changes to its selected state.
frame_description: The 'Under 10 min' button is highlighted.

description: The user repeatedly drags the handles of the Pay Rate slider to adjust the range.
frame_description: The user is interacting with the dual-handle slider in the Pay Rate section.

description: The pay rate range text (e.g., '$0 - $100+') updates dynamically as the slider handles are moved.
frame_description: The text above the slider changes to reflect the current selection.

description: The user scrolls down within the filter modal to view more options.
frame_description: The content of the filter modal moves upward, revealing the 'Device' section.

description: The user scrolls back up within the filter modal.
frame_description: The content of the filter modal moves downward, returning to the 'Pay Rate' and 'Duration' sections.

description: The user performs a series of rapid, repetitive adjustments to the Pay Rate slider handles.
frame_description: The user is continuously dragging the slider handles back and forth.

description: The pay rate range text updates rapidly in response to the slider movements.
frame_description: The displayed pay rate range changes constantly as the user drags the handles.

description: The user hovers the cursor over the 'Under 10 min' button before the segment ends.
frame_description: The cursor is stationary over the 'Under 10 min' button in the filter modal.
